Team | Pld | W | D | L | GF | GA | GD | Pts | Qualification
[Foresta Suceava](/wiki/Foresta_F%C4%83lticeni "Foresta Fălticeni") (C, P) | 34 | 24 | 5 | 5 | 76 | 28 | +48 | 77 | Promotion to [Divizia A](/wiki/2000%E2%80%9301_Divizia_A "2000–01 Divizia A")

[Dacia Pitești](/wiki/CS_Mioveni "CS Mioveni")[[a]](#cite_note-table_note_DAC0.38494526333406-3) (R) | 34 | 16 | 6 | 12 | 53 | 47 | +6 | 54 | Relegation to [Divizia C](/wiki/2000%E2%80%9301_Divizia_C "2000–01 Divizia C")
[Petrolul Moinești](/wiki/CSM_Moine%C8%99ti "CSM Moinești") (R) | 34 | 13 | 6 | 15 | 30 | 40 | −10 | 45 | Relegation to [Divizia C](/wiki/2000%E2%80%9301_Divizia_C "2000–01 Divizia C")
was the 60th season of the second tier of the [Romanian football league system](/wiki/Romanian_football_league_system "Romanian football league system").

* [Diplomatic Focșani](/wiki/CSM_Foc%C8%99ani "CSM Focșani") * [Callatis Mangalia](/wiki/FC_Callatis_Mangalia "FC Callatis Mangalia") * [Electro-Bere Craiova](/w/index.php?title=UFC_Electro_Craiova&action=edit&redlink=1 "UFC Electro Craiova (page does not exist)") * [UM Timișoara](/wiki/CSP_UM_Timi%C8%99oara "CSP UM Timișoara") * [Juventus București](/wiki/ASC_Daco-Getica_Bucure%C8%99ti "ASC Daco-Getica București") * [Flacăra Râmnicu Vâlcea](/w/index.php?title=Rarora_R%C3%A2mnicu_V%C3%A2lcea&action=edit&redlink=1 "Rarora Râmnicu Vâlcea (page does not exist)")   **Relegated from [Divizia A](/wiki/1998%E2%80%9399_Divizia_A "1998–99 Divizia A")**   * [Foresta Suceava](/wiki/Foresta_F%C4%83lticeni "Foresta Fălticeni") * [Universitatea Cluj](/wiki/FC_Universitatea_Cluj "FC Universitatea Cluj") * [Olimpia Satu Mare](/wiki/FC_Olimpia_Satu_Mare "FC Olimpia Satu Mare") | From Divizia B[[edit](/w/index.php?title=1999%E2%80%932000_Divizia_B&action=edit&section=3 "Edit section: From Divizia B")]  **Relegated to [Divizia C](/wiki/1999%E2%80%932000_Divizia_C "1999–2000 Divizia C")**   * [Rulmentul Alexandria](/wiki/CSM_Alexandria "CSM Alexandria") * [Vega Deva](/wiki/Vega_Deva "Vega Deva") * [Nitramonia Făgăraș](/wiki/CSM_F%C4%83g%C4%83ra%C8%99_(football) "CSM Făgăraș (football)") * [Baia Mare](/wiki/CS_Minaur_Baia_Mare_(football) "CS Minaur Baia Mare (football)") * [Dacia Unirea Brăila](/wiki/ACS_Dacia_Unirea_Br%C4%83ila "ACS Dacia Unirea Brăila") * [Unirea Dej](/wiki/FC_Unirea_Dej "FC Unirea Dej")   **Promoted to [Divizia A](/wiki/1999%E2%80%932000_Divizia_A "1999–2000 Divizia A")**   * [Brașov](/wiki/FC_Bra%C8%99ov_(1936) "FC Brașov (1936)") * [Extensiv Craiova](/wiki/FC_Caracal_(2004) "FC Caracal (2004)") * [Rocar București](/wiki/AFC_Rocar_Bucure%C8%99ti "AFC Rocar București") |
*Dacia Pitești* withdrew from the championship at the end of the season and left for free its place to Politehnica Timișoara, team that initially relegated.
*Drobeta-Turnu Severin* were deducted 6 points and lost 0-3 both matches against Chimica Târnăveni, after charges of match fixing.
*Politehnica Timișoara* was spared from relegation after Dacia Pitești withdrew and left its place for free to Politehnica.
*Chimica Târnăveni* lost 0-3 both matches against FC Drobeta-Turnu Severin, after charges of match fixing.

From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia

Romanian football league season

Football league season

| ← [1998–99](/wiki/1998%E2%80%9399_Divizia_B "1998–99 Divizia B")  [2000–01](/wiki/2000%E2%80%9301_Divizia_B "2000–01 Divizia B") → | |

The **1999–2000 Divizia B** was the 60th season of the second tier of the [Romanian football league system](/wiki/Romanian_football_league_system "Romanian football league system").

The format has been maintained to two series, each of them having 18 teams. At the end of the season, the winners of the series promoted to [Divizia A](/wiki/Liga_I "Liga I") and the last four places from both series relegated to [Divizia C](/wiki/Liga_III "Liga III").[[1]](#cite_note-1)[[2]](#cite_note-2)

Rules for classification: 1) Points; 2) Head-to-head points; 3) Head-to-head goal difference; 4) Head-to-head goals scored; 5) Head-to-head away goals scored; 6) Goal difference; 7) Goals scored.  
(C) Champions; (P) Promoted; (R) Relegated  
Notes:

1. **[^](#cite_ref-table_hth_DTS0.33677490257508_4-0)** *Drobeta-Turnu Severin* were deducted 6 points and lost 0-3 both matches against Chimica Târnăveni, after charges of match fixing.
2. **[^](#cite_ref-table_note_PTM0.33677490257508_5-0)** *Politehnica Timișoara* was spared from relegation after Dacia Pitești withdrew and left its place for free to Politehnica.
3. **[^](#cite_ref-table_note_CHI0.33677490257508_6-0)** *Chimica Târnăveni* lost 0-3 both matches against FC Drobeta-Turnu Severin, after charges of match fixing.
